headline: Is It Too Late To Consider C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) After A 66.6% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering whether C.H. Robinson Worldwide is still good value after a strong run in the share price? This article focuses squarely on what the current valuation might be telling you. The stock last closed at US$163.59, with returns of 66.6% over the past year and 74.0% over three years. However, it has fallen 3.8% over the past week and 10.2% over the past month, and sits roughly flat year to date with a 0.1% decline. Recent coverage of the company has focused on its role in global freight...

headline: C.H. Robinson Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings
summary: Although C.H. Robinson has outperformed the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts continue to maintain a measured yet optimistic outlook on the stock’s future prospects.
